history.text: Britain declared a protectorate over the southern Solomon Islands.
The Guadalcanal campaign made the islands central to the Pacific War.
The RAMSI regional assistance mission began after years of unrest.

worthSeeing.title: Iron Bottom Sound:
worthSeeing.text: WWII naval graveyard with dozens of ships lying in shallow, diveable waters.

worthSeeing.title: Marovo Lagoon:
worthSeeing.text: One of the world's largest saltwater lagoons, rich in coral and biodiversity.

worthSeeing.title: Skull Island:
worthSeeing.text: Traditional skull shrines in the western islands, testament to former headhunting culture.

planningQuestions.q: What is Solomon Islands known for?
planningQuestions.a: Iron Bottom Sound, Marovo Lagoon, Skull Island.

planningQuestions.q: How should I browse it here?
planningQuestions.a: Start with the facts, jump to linked cities, then check events and topics.
